translations.en: a gypsy girl poised on the verge of womanhood.
translations.zh: 正值豆蔻年華、即將蛻變為女人的吉普賽少女。

translations.en: "How could you be so mean to Kador! You go and apologize to my poor little dog this instant!"
translations.zh: 「你怎能那樣對卡多！馬上去向我可憐的小狗道歉！」

translations.en: "I have nothing to sell you. Talk to my father."
translations.zh: 「我沒有東西賣你。去找我父親說吧。」

translations.en: "@Father says I'm supposed to @dance for @gorgios."
translations.zh: 「@Father（父親）說我應該為@dance外人@gorgios（跳舞）。」

translations.en: "That's what we call anyone who isn't a @gypsy."
translations.zh: 「那是我們對所有非@gypsy（吉普）賽人的稱呼。」

translations.en: "It's a nice life, but it gets lonely. I miss my @sister."
translations.zh: 「這種生活不錯，但有時很孤單。我好想@sister（姐姐）。」

translations.en: "He is Zoltan, @king of the gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「他是佐爾坦，吉普賽人之@king（王）！」

translations.en: "Well, that's what he says."
translations.zh: 「嗯，那是他自己說的啦。」

translations.en: "Ask my father."
translations.zh: 「去問我父親吧。」

translations.en: "Oh, I just couldn't, not in front of so many @people."
translations.zh: 「哦，我真的不行，在這麼多@people（人面）前。」

translations.en: "I'd be too @embarassed!"
translations.zh: 「我會太@embarassed（害羞）的！」
translations.note: 原文拼寫錯誤 embarassed→embarrassed，照意譯

translations.en: "Well... Do you promise not to make fun of me?"
translations.zh: 「那……你保證不嘲笑我嗎？」

translations.en: "He's such a sweet little doggie..."
translations.zh: 「他是這麼可愛的小狗狗……」

translations.en: "Good bye, and sweet dreams to you."
translations.zh: 「再見，祝你好夢。」

translations.en: "I can't help you with that."
translations.zh: 「這個我幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "My name is Karina." she says, looking shyly at the ground. "Do you think it's a pretty name?"
translations.zh: 「我叫卡麗娜。」她說，害羞地低頭看地。「你覺得這個名字好聽嗎？」

translations.en: "Thank you."
translations.zh: 「謝謝你。」

translations.en: "Oh."
"Her name is Penumbra. Have you any news of her?"
translations.zh: 「她叫潘努布拉。你有她的消息嗎？」

translations.en: "If you do, please come tell me. I miss her so much..."
translations.zh: 「若有的話，請來告訴我。我好想她……」

translations.en: "Oh! I'm so glad to hear she's okay!" She throws her arms around you and kisses you on the cheek.
translations.zh: 「哦！聽到她平安無事真是太好了！」她撲上來擁抱你，在你臉頰上親了一下。

translations.en: "I have to ask you for a gold piece for my advice. Is that okay?"
translations.zh: 「我需要向你收取一枚金幣的建議費。這樣可以嗎？」

translations.en: "It was my father's idea!"
translations.zh: 「這是我父親的主意！」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. I'm not supposed to help you unless you pay."
translations.zh: 「對不起。我不付費就不能幫你。」

translations.en: "Ask our dog, @Kador, to do some tricks for you. He knows lots of them!"
translations.zh: 「讓我們的狗@Kador（卡多）為你表演幾個把戲吧。他會很多！」

translations.en: She turns away from you.
translations.zh: 她轉過身去。

translations.en: Suddenly she starts dancing a dance of haunting beauty, to the sound of music that seems to emanate from nowhere.*
translations.zh: 她忽然跳起舞來，那舞姿攝人心魄，而伴奏的樂聲彷彿從虛空中飄然而至。*

translations.en: It's one of the most wondrous sights you've ever seen.*
translations.zh: 這是你有生以來見過最令人心醉的景象之一。*

translations.en: After a timeless time, the music ceases, and she turns and runs away.
translations.zh: 不知過了多久，樂聲止歇，她轉身跑去。

translator_notes: 卡麗娜是吉普賽少女，天真害羞，口語化。她有一隻狗卡多和一位姐姐潘努布拉。
